subject: A Moogle dressed in dark knight armor, holding a sword raised overhead in a combat stance, rendered in a bold flat graphic art style
description: A small white fluffy Moogle creature — recognizable by its round body, small wings, and pom-pom antenna — is outfitted in dark layered armor and holds a sword raised above its head in a battle-ready pose. The art style is bold, flat, and graphic, with heavy outlines and a warm golden-tan background featuring large decorative swirl motifs. The Moogle's wide eyes project a determined but slightly endearing expression despite the martial stance. A red round object (likely the traditional Moogle pom-pom on its antenna) is visible. The card frame identifies this as a 'Forward / Standard Unit' from Final Fantasy Tactics Advance.
foreground: White fluffy Moogle in dark plate armor, sword raised overhead, pom-pom antenna visible
background: Warm golden-tan with large bold swirl and star decorative motifs
emotion: Determined and battle-ready; sword raised high conveys readiness despite small stature
